buttonA.name: Press Enter
buttonA.command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 36'

buttonB.name: Codex Voice Input (Ctrl+Z hold)
buttonB.command: echo 'buttonB is handled by built-in Codex voice shortcut (Ctrl+Z hold)'

buttonX.name: Delete Backward
buttonX.command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 51'

buttonY.name: Ctrl-A then Ctrl-K
buttonY.command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "a" using control down' -e 'delay 0.05' -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "k" using control down'

dpadDown.name: Emacs ECA Chat Delete Buffer
dpadDown.command: __front_app="$(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to name of first process whose frontmost is true')"; echo "[dpadDown] front_app=${__front_app}"; test "${__front_app#Emacs}" != "$__front_app" || echo "[dpadDown] skip_not_emacs"; test "${__front_app#Emacs}" != "$__front_app" && "/Applications/Emacs 2.app/Contents/MacOS/bin-arm64-11/emacsclient" -n --eval '(let* ((win (selected-window)) (buf (and (window-live-p win) (window-buffer win))) (mode (and (buffer-live-p buf) (buffer-local-value (quote major-mode) buf)))) (if (or (eq mode (quote eca-chat)) (eq mode (quote eca-chat-mode))) (progn (with-selected-window win (kill-buffer buf)) (let* ((new-buf (and (window-live-p win) (window-buffer win))) (new-mode (and (buffer-live-p new-buf) (buffer-local-value (quote major-mode) new-buf)))) (format "action_executed mode=%s new_mode=%s buffer=%s" mode new-mode (if new-buf (buffer-name new-buf) "nil")))) (format "skip_non_eca_mode mode=%s buffer=%s" mode (if buf (buffer-name buf) "nil"))))'; __run_status=$?; echo "[dpadDown] gate_or_run_status=${__run_status}"

dpadLeft.name: Emacs Tab Prev + Bottom
dpadLeft.command: __front_app="$(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to name of first process whose frontmost is true')"; echo "[dpadLeft] front_app=${__front_app}"; test "${__front_app#Emacs}" != "$__front_app" || echo "[dpadLeft] skip_not_emacs"; test "${__front_app#Emacs}" != "$__front_app" && "/Applications/Emacs 2.app/Contents/MacOS/bin-arm64-11/emacsclient" -n --eval '(let* ((win (selected-window)) (buf (and (window-live-p win) (window-buffer win))) (mode (and (buffer-live-p buf) (buffer-local-value (quote major-mode) buf)))) (if (or (eq mode (quote eca-chat)) (eq mode (quote eca-chat-mode))) (progn (with-selected-window win (tab-line-switch-to-prev-tab) (goto-char (point-max))) (let* ((new-buf (window-buffer win)) (new-mode (and (buffer-live-p new-buf) (buffer-local-value (quote major-mode) new-buf)))) (format "action_executed mode=%s new_mode=%s buffer=%s" mode new-mode (if new-buf (buffer-name new-buf) "nil")))) (format "skip_non_eca_mode mode=%s buffer=%s" mode (if buf (buffer-name buf) "nil"))))'; __run_status=$?; echo "[dpadLeft] gate_or_run_status=${__run_status}"

dpadRight.name: Emacs Tab Next + Bottom
dpadRight.command: __front_app="$(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to name of first process whose frontmost is true')"; echo "[dpadRight] front_app=${__front_app}"; test "${__front_app#Emacs}" != "$__front_app" || echo "[dpadRight] skip_not_emacs"; test "${__front_app#Emacs}" != "$__front_app" && "/Applications/Emacs 2.app/Contents/MacOS/bin-arm64-11/emacsclient" -n --eval '(let* ((win (selected-window)) (buf (and (window-live-p win) (window-buffer win))) (mode (and (buffer-live-p buf) (buffer-local-value (quote major-mode) buf)))) (if (or (eq mode (quote eca-chat)) (eq mode (quote eca-chat-mode))) (progn (with-selected-window win (tab-line-switch-to-next-tab) (goto-char (point-max))) (let* ((new-buf (window-buffer win)) (new-mode (and (buffer-live-p new-buf) (buffer-local-value (quote major-mode) new-buf)))) (format "action_executed mode=%s new_mode=%s buffer=%s" mode new-mode (if new-buf (buffer-name new-buf) "nil")))) (format "skip_non_eca_mode mode=%s buffer=%s" mode (if buf (buffer-name buf) "nil"))))'; __run_status=$?; echo "[dpadRight] gate_or_run_status=${__run_status}"

dpadUp.name: Emacs ECA Chat New
dpadUp.command: __front_app="$(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to name of first process whose frontmost is true')"; echo "[dpadUp] front_app=${__front_app}"; test "${__front_app#Emacs}" != "$__front_app" || echo "[dpadUp] skip_not_emacs"; test "${__front_app#Emacs}" != "$__front_app" && "/Applications/Emacs 2.app/Contents/MacOS/bin-arm64-11/emacsclient" -n --eval '(let* ((win (selected-window)) (buf (and (window-live-p win) (window-buffer win))) (mode (and (buffer-live-p buf) (buffer-local-value (quote major-mode) buf)))) (if (or (eq mode (quote eca-chat)) (eq mode (quote eca-chat-mode))) (progn (with-selected-window win (eca-chat-new)) (let* ((new-buf (window-buffer win)) (new-mode (and (buffer-live-p new-buf) (buffer-local-value (quote major-mode) new-buf)))) (format "action_executed mode=%s new_mode=%s buffer=%s" mode new-mode (if new-buf (buffer-name new-buf) "nil")))) (format "skip_non_eca_mode mode=%s buffer=%s" mode (if buf (buffer-name buf) "nil"))))'; __run_status=$?; echo "[dpadUp] gate_or_run_status=${__run_status}"

rightShoulder.name: Press Control-j
rightShoulder.command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "j" using control down'

script.name: switch-emacs-eca-chat-mode
script.command: osascript -e 'tell application "Emacs" to activate'; "/Applications/Emacs 2.app/Contents/MacOS/bin-arm64-11/emacsclient" -n --eval '(catch (quote done) (dolist (b (buffer-list)) (with-current-buffer b (when (or (eq major-mode (quote eca-chat)) (eq major-mode (quote eca-chat-mode))) (switch-to-buffer b) (goto-char (point-max)) (throw (quote done) t)))) nil)'

script.name: switch-chrome-chatgpt
script.command: echo '[slot2] switch to ChatGPT in Chrome' && __found="$(osascript -e 'tell application "Google Chrome" to activate' -e 'tell application "Google Chrome"' -e 'repeat with w in windows' -e 'set i to 1' -e 'repeat with t in tabs of w' -e 'if (URL of t contains "chatgpt.com") then' -e 'set active tab index of w to i' -e 'set index of w to 1' -e 'return "FOUND"' -e 'end if' -e 'set i to i + 1' -e 'end repeat' -e 'end repeat' -e 'return "NOT_FOUND"' -e 'end tell')" && echo "[slot2] chatgpt_tab=${__found}" && ([ "${__found}" = "FOUND" ] || open -a 'Google Chrome' 'https://chatgpt.com') && osascript -e 'tell application "Google Chrome" to activate' -e 'delay 0.15' -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "a" using control down'

script.name: emacs-eshell-logseq-upsert-block
script.command: osascript -e 'tell application "Emacs" to activate'; "/Applications/Emacs 2.app/Contents/MacOS/bin-arm64-11/emacsclient" -n --eval '(let ((target (get-buffer "logseq-eshell"))) (if target (switch-to-buffer target) (progn (eshell) (rename-buffer "logseq-eshell" t))) (goto-char (point-max)) (unless (bolp) (insert "\n")) (insert "logseq upsert block -g demo -c " (string 39) (string 39)) (backward-char 1))'
